Kubernetes Deployment Manifest: This deployment.yaml defines the production deployment for the api-service, running 3 replicas of the api-server container with resource requests of 0.5 CPU and 512Mi memory, and limits of 1 CPU and 1Gi memory. A readiness probe on /healthz with an initial delay of 10 seconds and period of 5 seconds ensures traffic is only routed to healthy pods. Rolling update strategy is configured with maxSurge of 1 and maxUnavailable of 0 to guarantee zero-downtime deployments. The deployment references a ConfigMap for non-secret configuration and a Secret for database credentials and API keys.
